results.description: per-file function/class counts as a table
results.intent: for each python file in the project, count functions and classes, print a table
results.program:
for f in files:
    n = len(find_names(f, '.fn'))
    n_classes = len(find_names(f, '.class'))
    print(f, n, n_classes)
results.raw:
for f in files:
    n = len(find_names(f, '.fn'))
    n_classes = len(find_names(f, '.class'))
    print(f, n, n_classes)

find the most complex class -> complexity('src/**/*.py', '.class')

results.description: iterate classes, list methods per class
results.intent: find all classes, then for each class show its methods
results.program:
classes = find_names('src/**/*.py', '.class')
for cls in classes:
    methods = find_names('src/**/*.py', f'.class#{cls} .fn')
    print(f"{cls}: {len(methods)} methods")

    print(f"{cls}: {len(methods)} methods")

results.description: set difference between src and test function names
results.intent: compare the function names in tests/ vs src/ to find untested functions
results.program:
tests = "tests/**/*.py"
src = "src/**/*.py"
test_names = find_names(tests, '.fn')
src_names = find_names(src, '.fn')
untested = [n for n in src_names if n not in test_names]
print(untested)
results.raw:
tests = "tests/**/*.py"
src = "src/**/*.py"
test_names = find_names(tests, '.fn')
src_names = find_names(src, '.fn')
untested = [n for n in src_names if n not in test_names]
print(untested)

results.intent: find all classes that have an __init__ method and show what parameters it takes
for each module, find functions that start with _ (private) and list them grouped by file
results.program:
for f in files:
        n = len(find_names(f, '.fn'))
        private = [name for name in n if name.startswith('_')]
        print(f, n, private)
results.raw:
for f in files:
        n = len(find_names(f, '.fn'))
        private = [name for name in n if name.startswith('_')]
        print(f, n, private)
find all functions that start with _ (private) -> find_names('src/**/*.py', '.fn#_')
